mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs Charles Stewart
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs Charles Stewart Offense: Curse and abuse Victim and Complainant: M.G. Kelley, Justice of the Peace Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 03.19.1887 Costs: Jail time, $2.50 fine and court cost
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
